description: Developing low-code solutions, building and nurturing the low-code community and supporting other business users. Working closely with stakeholders to design and deliver new technical solutions.
Developing low-code solutions to automate and support internal processes.
Built a digital marketplace for small producers to sell directly to consumers, working as CEO and handling board meetings, company outreach, and idea testing.
Delivering weekly web development lectures as employer and later as freelancer through Konsultbyrå Liman.
Completed various freelance jobs including painting houses, gardening, WordPress website development, and dog sitting.
Provided customer service for Finnair s customers in Swedish, English, and Finnish. I assisted with reservations, travel extras, and solving customers problems during travels.
